- [error] arbitrary value: hover:shadow-[0_25px_80px_-20px_rgba(59,130,246,0.4)] (line 79)

- Remove shadow-[0_20px_60px_-15px_rgba(59,130,246,0.3)]. Use a value from the design scale, or add a theme token if the design genuinely needs it.
- Remove hover:shadow-[0_25px_80px_-20px_rgba(59,130,246,0.4)]. Use a value from the design scale, or add a theme token if the design genuinely needs it.
